text: Customer Success Associate. We need a bilingual Spanish and English speaker for customer onboarding, account support, and renewal coordination. The role is hybrid in Austin and requires strong organizational skills.
Technical Support Specialist. This remote role handles API troubleshooting, bug triage, and customer escalations. Experience with Zendesk, SQL logs, and clear written communication is required.

Data Analyst. The team builds dashboards, cleans marketing data, writes SQL queries, and explains campaign performance to business stakeholders. Python experience and data visualization skills are preferred.

Restaurant Shift Lead. Responsibilities include guest service, staff scheduling, inventory checks, food safety, and training new team members. Bilingual Spanish skills are a plus for this customer-facing role.

Product Operations Coordinator. The coordinator manages vendor communication, launch checklists, inventory updates, and cross-functional project tracking. Strong spreadsheet skills and attention to detail are important.
Healthcare Front Desk Representative. Duties include patient intake, appointment scheduling, insurance verification, phone support, and bilingual communication with Spanish-speaking patients.

Machine Learning Engineer. The engineer develops model evaluation pipelines, feature stores, batch inference jobs, and monitoring for data drift. Python, PyTorch, and cloud deployment experience are required.

Customer Support Manager. Lead a remote support team, review escalation metrics, coach agents, and improve help center workflows. The role requires customer success experience and excellent written communication.

Marketing Analyst. This position uses SQL, dashboard reporting, A/B testing, and attribution analysis to measure campaign performance. Data visualization and stakeholder communication are key requirements.

Warehouse Operations Lead. The lead manages inventory counts, shipping schedules, vendor pickups, safety checks, and team training. Spreadsheet tracking and shift coordination experience are preferred.

Implementation Consultant. Work with enterprise customers on onboarding, workflow configuration, API integration, training sessions, and renewal handoff. Strong project management and customer-facing communication are required.

Clinical Scheduling Coordinator. The coordinator handles appointment scheduling, patient phone support, insurance questions, bilingual Spanish communication, and accurate record updates in the clinic system.
